recruiter_response_rate.description: Historical alignment of recruiter intent from candidate platform interaction.

skills_business_score.description: Deterministic semantic extraction of core business logic requirements.

skills_technical_score.description: Deterministic semantic extraction of core technical requirements.

semantic_alignment_score.description: Dense vector overlap between JD graph and Candidate embedding (E5).

lexical_overlap_score.description: Exact keyword string match derived from BM25.

integrity_score.description: Penalty multiplier enforcing chronological coherence and penalizing keyword stuffing.

time_in_role.description: Calculated total duration in most relevant target position.

seniority_alignment.description: Boolean match between JD requested tier (e.g. Principal) and candidate trajectory.

total_experience_years.description: Aggregate sum of normalized career timeline.

education_tier.description: Categorical ranking of academic background relevant to the domain.

job_hopping_penalty.description: Negative modifier for candidates with >3 roles <1 year duration.

recent_promotion_flag.description: Indicates upward trajectory in recent 2 years.

leadership_experience.description: Extracted evidence of team management or architecture ownership.

domain_expertise_score.description: Specific alignment to Enterprise Search / Retrieval domain.

tooling_diversity.description: Count of distinct, relevant technologies identified in candidate profile.

company_tier_match.description: Alignment of previous company scale with target JD scale.

publication_flag.description: Boolean indicating academic or industry publications.

open_source_contributions.description: Flag for active engagement in open source repositories.

interview_historical_pass_rate.description: Platform-derived metric indicating candidate success in similar past funnels.
